desc:
Savage Divide Treasure Map #5 dig site: This treasure can be found on a promontory above the Blackwater Mine, east of the large lake in The Forest and the Whitespring Resort. Right in front of the big advertising sign is the pile of earth where you can dig for the treasure.
Grid F5 (X: 2285.8, Y: 1714.5)
Submitted By MrCrazy
